title: senecio microbasis
intro: Senecio microbasis, also known as the Microbasis Ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Australia. The plant has been found to contain pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which are known for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Senecio microbasis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Senecio microbasis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various forms of traditional medicine to be created from this plant.
